semantic.role: Vitest end-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands.
responsibilities: Runs ArchSpine CLI commands in a child process using spawnSync.
Sets up temporary directories and configures CLI execution environment (e.g., temp workspace).
Executes integration tests for specific CLI subcommands (init, build, etc.) with assertions.
Cleans up test artifacts (e.g., temporary directories) after each test via afterEach.
Uses Vitest's describe/it blocks to organize test scenarios and assertions.
Writes wrapper scripts (e.g., for prompts) to handle interactive CLI input.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual functions or modules within ArchSpine.
Production code of the ArchSpine CLI or library.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provides automated regression testing for the CLI interface to ensure stability and behavior across commands.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Add E2E test suite for CLI commands (37 tests across 7 files)

publicSurface: No public exports; this file is a self-executing test suite.

English.role: Vitest end-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands.
responsibilities: Runs ArchSpine CLI commands in a child process using spawnSync.
Sets up temporary directories and configures CLI execution environment.
Executes integration tests for specific CLI subcommands with assertions.
Cleans up temporary artifacts after each test.
Organizes test scenarios using describe/it blocks and Vitest matchers.
Writes wrapper scripts to simulate interactive CLI input.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于 ArchSpine CLI 命令的 Vitest 端到端测试套件。
responsibilities: 使用 spawnSync 在子进程中运行 ArchSpine CLI 命令。
创建临时目录并配置 CLI 执行环境（例如临时工作区）。
执行特定 CLI 子命令（如 init、build 等）的集成测试并断言结果。
每个测试后清理临时工件。
使用 describe/it 块组织测试场景并使用 Vitest 匹配器进行验证。
编写包装脚本来模拟交互式 CLI 输入。
outOfScope: 单个函数或模块的单元测试。
非 CLI 功能或 GUI 测试。
